behavior_summary: Provides the gameplay logic for a bed object associated with the NPC Mordea/Tempest: it supplies descriptive text when examined, keeps the bed's visual frame in sync with schedule and NPC state, and runs a multi-step awakening/teleport/effect sequence when the bed is used.

MORDEABE::look examines the bed's current frame and two global flags (mordeaName, mordeaJob) to choose a short description (bark) appropriate to whether the bed/occupant is named/known as Mordea or Tempest or generic 'sleeping woman'.

U8P_MORDEABE::enterFastArea updates the bed's display frame based on mordeaSchedule and whether the associated NPC is dead, so the bed visually reflects schedule/state when actors enter its trigger area.

U8P_MORDEABE::use orchestrates a scripted awakening: it puts the avatar in stasis, spawns visual and sound effects, animates the bed frames, teleports/orients an NPC into the scene, issues dialog barks, and spawns U8P_MORDEABE::04C0 to apply lightning/debris effects and area damage; it also schedules helper METHODS/processes for timed animations and cleanup.

U8P_MORDEABE::04C0 is a short-lived effect/damage helper: it spawns a LightningBolt process, creates and animates temporary debris items, plays SFX, queries NPC HP, and calls Item::receiveHit to apply area damage.
notable_control_flow: MORDEABE::look branches first on Item::getFrame; if frame == 0x0B it always barks 'Mordea's bed'. Otherwise it reads globals mordeaName and mordeaJob to select one of several short description strings.

enterFastArea reads mordeaSchedule and Npc::isDead to choose and set one of two frames (open/closed or variants) using Item::setFrame — this runs on fast-area entry events and is idempotent to keep visuals synchronized.
use checks the bed frame before running the awakening sequence — if the bed is already awakened (frame indicates opened) it avoids re-running the full sequence.

use spawns multiple helper processes and METHODs to stagger animations, orientation, and teleport operations; U8P_MORDEABE::04C0 is spawned to perform synchronous-looking visual/damage effects while other spawned METHODS handle NPC orientation and subsequent animations.

The awakening sequence temporarily suspends player control (setAvatarInStasis) and relies on spawned processes/methods for sequencing and cleanup instead of long blocking waits in the main use routine.
open_questions: Exact text strings used for each bark variant other than the canonical examples ('Mordea's bed', 'Mordea the Tempest', 'Mordea', 'Tempest', 'sleeping woman') — the disassembly shows selection logic but not every literal in full.
Precise numeric meanings of the item frames (0x0A, 0x0B, others) beyond 'closed/open/awakened' are inferred but not fully enumerated.
Exact damage values and damage type applied by Item::receiveHit in U8P_MORDEABE::04C0 — the routine references NPC HP when capping damage but exact formula is not explicit.

Which NPC instance is targeted (by ID or by a link from the bed) and how that association is encoded in the object data — the code teleports/queries an NPC but the exact pointer/association mechanics are inferred.
Whether any of the mordea* globals are modified elsewhere in game logic that would change long-term bed behavior (they are only read here).

main_function.name: U8P_MORDEABE::look
main_function.purpose: Produce a short descriptive bark when a player or NPC examines the Mordea bed/item, selecting the text based on the bed's visual frame and two global flags (mordeaName and mordeaJob).
entry_conditions: Triggered when an actor uses the 'U8P_MORDEABE::look' (examine) verb on the bed item.
Relies on Item::getFrame and global flags mordeaName and mordeaJob to choose the appropriate description.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEABE::look
function_map.role: Examine/U8P_MORDEABE::look handler that selects and issues short descriptive text (Item::bark) based on item frame and mordeaName/mordeaJob globals.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEABE::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area trigger handler that updates the bed's Item::setFrame according to mordeaSchedule and the associated NPC's alive/dead state to keep the visual consistent.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEABE::use
function_map.role: Main awakening/activation routine: freezes avatar, sequences animations/effects, teleports and orients the NPC, spawns effect/damage helper, and schedules cleanup.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEABE::04C0
function_map.role: Spawned effect/damage process: creates LightningBolt, spawns and animates temporary debris items, plays SFX, queries NPC HP, and calls Item::receiveHit to apply area damage.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawned to perform the visual lightning/debris effects and apply area damage as part of the full awakening sequence.
No direct call; both are per-event handlers operating on the same item. (Included to clarify there is no implied synchronous handoff.)

external_calls.purpose: Query the bed's current display frame to decide which descriptive text to bark.
Emit the short description string to the examining process (player/NPC).
Check whether the associated NPC is dead to influence which frame the bed should display.
Set the bed's visual frame based on schedule and NPC alive/dead state.
Temporarily freeze player/avatar control during the scripted awakening sequence.
Get bed Z coordinate to position spawned visual effects relative to the bed.
Get bed Y coordinate for teleport/effect placement calculations.
Get bed X coordinate for teleport/effect placement calculations.
Compute direction from an NPC/process to the bed in order to orient spawned METHODS/animations toward it.
Query NPC facing to schedule orientation/animation METHOD calls.
Start helper processes and METHODS that animate, delay, or sequence NPC orientation and other timed parts of the event.
Teleport (force-move) the NPC into position at the bed as part of the awakening.
Create a visual lightning effect during the awakening/damage step.
Create temporary debris/effect items to animate around the bed during the lightning/explosion effect.
Place created temporary items into the world at specific coordinates/frames for animation.
Play sound effects associated with the lightning/explosion event.
Remove temporary debris items after their animation is finished.
Query NPC HP to cap or scale damage applied by the effect.
Apply damage/hit to targets in the bed's area as the effect consequence.

reads.name: mordeaName
reads.likely_effect: Selects which name fragment to use in the bed's descriptive bark (influences choice between 'Mordea', 'Tempest', and combined forms).

reads.name: mordeaJob
reads.likely_effect: Used together with mordeaName to disambiguate which descriptive text to show when the bed is examined.

reads.name: mordeaSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Determines which visual frame the bed should display in enterFastArea (schedule-driven open/closed state).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the gameplay logic for a bed object associated with the NPC Mordea/Tempest: it supplies descriptive text when examined, keeps the bed's visual frame in sync with schedule and NPC state, and runs a multi-step awakening/teleport/effect sequence when the bed is used.
